page_metadata.biotools__summary: This server allows to use the BACHSCORE tool with the aim of discriminating the best model of a protein (the native state or a structure very similar to it) among a large set of alternative conformations.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This server allows to use the BACHSCORE tool with the aim of discriminating the best model of a protein (the native state or a structure very similar to it) among a large set of alternative conformations.
